name: Obby: Extreme Cart Ride
description: Jumps, speed, and nonstop forward momentum — there’s no time to slow down! Get ready for a wild ride across challenging tracks where every section demands precision and quick reactions. Accelerate, overcome dangerous segments, dodge traps, and try not to fly off the track. Every mistake can cost you the victory — and that’s exactly what makes each run so exciting. As you progress, the tracks become more difficult and the obstacles more unpredictable. Test your control skills, learn to feel the speed, and prove that you can reach the finish line even in the most extreme conditions. What awaits you: • Unique tracks with unexpected turn
instructions: PC Controls bull W A S D mdash Move character bull Space mdash Jump bull Right mouse button mouse movement mdash Camera control Mobile Controls bull Left joystick mdash Move character bull On-screen button mdash Jump amp
